top_findings.title: Fewer than 3 tests — only a trivial placeholder test exists
top_findings.evidence: src/lib.rs:11 `it_works` asserts add(2,2)==4; tests/ is empty; no test exercises any book route or DB call. test_coverage=1.0 only reflects 1/1 trivial test passing.
top_findings.suggestion: Add >=3 integration tests hitting the CRUD/health routes (e.g. via actix_web::test) that assert status codes and JSON bodies.

top_findings.title: ?author= filter uses the wrong extractor and does not work
top_findings.evidence: src/main.rs:64 `author: web::Query<Option<String>>` — serde_urlencoded cannot bind the `author` key into `Option<String>`; `GET /books?author=X` fails Query extraction (400) rather than filtering. Only the no-param list path yields None and works.
top_findings.suggestion: Deserialize into a struct, e.g. `#[derive(Deserialize)] struct BookQuery { author: Option<String> }` and pass `web::Query<BookQuery>`.

top_findings.title: SQLite connect string lacks create-if-missing; server fails to start on a fresh checkout
top_findings.evidence: src/main.rs:217 and src/main.rs:36/65/94/144/178 use `sqlite://books.db` with sqlx default create_if_missing=false. No books.db ships in the run_dir, so `SqlitePool::connect` errors and main() calls process::exit(1) before binding.
